hero.name: Pito Desri Pauzi
hero.subtitle: I build fast, scalable, and beautiful web experiences — from pixel-perfect frontends to rock-solid backends.

about.bio:
Saya seorang mahasiswa semester 6 dengan minat besar di dunia full-stack development. Berpengalaman dalam mengembangkan sistem backend dan merancang antarmuka pengguna yang sederhana namun efektif.

Saya selalu berusaha menulis kode yang bersih dan mudah dipelihara, serta menciptakan desain yang fokus pada kebutuhan pengguna. Passionate tentang membangun pengalaman digital yang intuitif dan berperforma tinggi lewat kode yang bersih.

projects.title: BOSS - Business One Stop System
projects.description: Platform Kasir & Manajemen Bisnis UMKM Indonesia. Sistem POS terintegrasi all-in-one untuk Owner (pantau keuangan real-time), Kasir (proses transaksi), Dapur, dan Antrian/Pesanan Pelanggan.

projects.title: E-Commerce Platform
projects.description: A full-featured e-commerce platform with real-time inventory management, payment integration, and a powerful admin dashboard.

projects.title: Task Management App
projects.description: A collaborative project management tool with real-time updates, drag-and-drop boards, and team collaboration features.

projects.title: API Gateway Service
projects.description: A high-performance API gateway with rate limiting, authentication, load balancing, and detailed analytics dashboard.

experience.description: Building web applications for clients across various industries. Specializing in Next.js, Laravel, and PostgreSQL.
Built and maintained responsive web interfaces using React and TypeScript. Collaborated with design and backend teams.
Developed client websites using PHP, Laravel, and Vue.js. Managed deployments and server configurations.

contact.heading: Let's Build Something Great
contact.subheading: Have a project in mind? I'd love to hear about it. Drop me a message and let's make it happen.

meta.siteTitle: Pito Desri Pauzi - Portfolio | Full Stack Developer
meta.siteDescription: Explore the portfolio of Full Stack Developer Pito Desri Pauzi, showcasing expertise in React, Next.js, Node.js, Laravel, and more.

education.description: Fokus pada pemrograman komputer, jaringan komputer, administrasi server, dan rekayasa perangkat lunak.

certifications.title: Belajar Membuat Aplikasi Back-End untuk Pemula

services.title: Full-Stack Web App
services.description: Mengembangkan aplikasi web lengkap dari database, backend, hingga antarmuka frontend (SaaS, Kasir POS, Admin Panel).

services.title: Backend API Development
services.description: Membangun restful API server menggunakan Node.js/Express, Laravel, database PostgreSQL/MySQL, serta integrasi Redis caching.

services.title: Frontend Slice & Integration
services.description: Mengubah desain Figma menjadi halaman web interaktif pixel-perfect menggunakan React/Next.js dan TailwindCSS dengan animasi responsif.
